props.name: items
props.description: Array of dock items. Each item should include an icon, label, onClick handler, and an optional className.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the dock panel.

props.name: distance
props.description: Pixel distance used to calculate the magnification effect based on mouse proximity.

props.name: panelHeight
props.description: Height (in pixels) of the dock panel.

props.name: baseItemSize
props.description: The base size (in pixels) for each dock item.

props.name: dockHeight
props.description: Maximum height (in pixels) of the dock container.

props.name: magnification
props.description: The magnified size (in pixels) applied to a dock item when hovered.

props.name: spring
props.description: Configuration options for the spring animation.
